case_title: ANTHONY YOO VS. TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,827.70 FILED BY YOO, ANTHONY AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR AUG-22-2012 AT 08:30 AM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (5 PAGE) PAID BY PLAINTIFF YOO, ANTHONY
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF (NO SERVICE FEE $) SERVED JUL-12-2012, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-22-2012 - CONTINUED PER STIPULATION OF ALL PARTIES TO AUG-29-2012 AT 8:30 AM IN DEPT. 506. BOTH PARTIES PRESENT. DEFENDANT DOES NOT STIPULATE TO A JUDGE PRO TEM. CONTINUED FOR JUDGE MITCHELL TO HEAR CASE. JUDGE PRO TEM: QUEENA HO. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)
RETURNED MAIL: CONTINUE ORDER MAILED 8/22/12 TO PLAINTIFF ANTHONY YOO/ATTEMPTED NOT KNOWN/UNABLE TO FORWARD".
DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF AUG-29-2012 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF AUG-29-2012 BY DONALD S. MITCHELL. APPEARANCES BY BOTH PARTIES. DEFENDANT WAS REPRESENTED BY JACKY LOPEZ.NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: DONALD S. MITCHELL. CLERK: P. NATT. NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF AUG-29-2012 - JUDGMENT.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF YOO, ANTHONY RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT TRINITY MANAGEMENT SERVICES, INC. $3,686.50 PRINCIPAL, $50.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $3,736.50, DEFENDANT IS TO RECEIVE A CREDIT AGAINST THE JUDGMENT IN THE AMOUNT OF $1,538.20 AS THIS AMOUNT HAS ALREADY BEEN PAID TO THE PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS NO EXHIBITS FILED
